sentences.arabic: نَادِرًا مَا تَكُونُ الْمَشَارِيعُ النَّاجِحَةُ نَتِيجَةَ جُهُودِ فَرْدٍ وَاحِدٍ، بَلْ هِيَ تَنْبُعُ مِنَ التَّعَاوُنِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Uspješni projekti su rijetko rezultat truda pojedinca, već proizlaze iz kolektivne saradnje.
sentences.translationEn: Successful projects are rarely the result of a single individual's efforts; rather, they stem from collective cooperation.

sentences.arabic: يَضْمَنُ التَّوَاصُلُ الْفَعَّالُ بَيْنَ أَعْضَاءِ الْفَرِيقِ أَنَّ الْجَمِيعَ يَعْمَلُونَ نَحْوَ هَدَفٍ مُشْتَرَكٍ.
sentences.translation: Efikasna komunikacija među članovima tima osigurava da svi rade ka zajedničkom cilju.
sentences.translationEn: Effective communication among team members ensures that everyone is working towards a common goal.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ كُلُّ عُضْوٍ مَجْمُوعَةً فَرِيدَةً مِنَ الْمَهَارَاتِ وَالرُّؤَى الَّتِي تُثْرِي الْعَمَلِيَّةَ الْإِبْدَاعِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Svaki član pruža jedinstven skup vještina i vizija koje obogaćuju kreativni proces.
sentences.translationEn: Each member provides a unique set of skills and insights that enrich the creative process.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَنْشَأُ النِّزَاعَاتُ، يَجِبُ حَلُّهَا مِنْ خِلَالِ الْحِوَارِ الْبَنَّاءِ وَالِاحْتِرَامِ الْمُتَبَادَلِ.
sentences.translation: Kada se pojave sukobi, oni se moraju rješavati kroz konstruktivan dijalog i uzajamno poštovanje.
sentences.translationEn: When conflicts arise, they must be resolved through constructive dialogue and mutual respect.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ بِيئَةَ الْعَمَلِ الصِّحِّيَّةَ تُشَجِّعُ عَلَى تَبَادُلِ الْأَفْكَارِ وَتَدْعَمُ النُّمُوَّ الْمِهْنِيَّ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Zdravo radno okruženje podstiče razmjenu ideja i podržava profesionalni rast za sve.
sentences.translationEn: A healthy work environment encourages the exchange of ideas and supports professional growth for everyone.
